JS CDN公共库

Library Remark
Total 865

jquery

version:(3.5.1)

https://cdnjs.cloudflare.com/ajax/libs/jquery/3.5.1/jquery.min.js

JavaScript library for DOM operations

jquery-compat

version:(3.0.0-alpha1)

https://cdnjs.cloudflare.com/ajax/libs/jquery-compat/3.0.0-alpha1/jquery.min.js

JavaScript library for DOM operations

blueimp-file-upload

version:(10.25.0)

https://cdnjs.cloudflare.com/ajax/libs/blueimp-file-upload/10.25.0/js/jquery.fileupload.min.js

File Upload widget with multiple file selection, drag&drop support, progress bar, validation and preview images, audio and video for jQuery. Supports cross-domain, chunked and resumable file uploads. Works with any server-side platform (Google App Engine, PHP, Python, Ruby on Rails, Java, etc.) that supports standard HTML form file uploads.

fullPage.js

version:(3.0.8)

https://cdnjs.cloudflare.com/ajax/libs/fullPage.js/3.0.8/fullpage.min.css

Create beautiful fullscreen scrolling websites

select2

version:(4.0.12)

https://cdnjs.cloudflare.com/ajax/libs/select2/4.0.12/js/select2.min.js

Select2 is a jQuery based replacement for select boxes. It supports searching, remote data sets, and infinite scrolling of results.

chosen

version:(1.8.7)

https://cdnjs.cloudflare.com/ajax/libs/chosen/1.8.7/chosen.jquery.min.js

Chosen is a JavaScript plugin that makes select boxes user-friendly. It is currently available in both jQuery and Prototype flavors.

cheerio

version:(1.0.0-rc.3)

https://cdnjs.cloudflare.com/ajax/libs/cheerio/1.0.0-rc.3/index.js

Tiny, fast, and elegant implementation of core jQuery designed specifically for the server

Sortable

version:(1.10.1)

https://cdnjs.cloudflare.com/ajax/libs/Sortable/1.10.1/Sortable.min.js

Minimalist JavaScript library for reorderable drag-and-drop lists on modern browsers and touch devices. No jQuery. Supports AngularJS and any CSS library, e.g. Bootstrap.

popmotion

version:(9.0.0-beta-8)

https://cdnjs.cloudflare.com/ajax/libs/popmotion/9.0.0-beta-8/popmotion.global.min.js

The JavaScript motion engine. Handles animation, physics, and input tracking.

jquery.pjax

version:(2.0.1)

https://cdnjs.cloudflare.com/ajax/libs/jquery.pjax/2.0.1/jquery.pjax.min.js

pjax is a jQuery plugin that uses ajax and pushState to deliver a fast browsing experience with real permalinks, page titles, and a working back button.

velocity

version:(2.0.5)

https://cdnjs.cloudflare.com/ajax/libs/velocity/2.0.5/velocity.min.js

Accelerated JavaScript animation.

zepto

version:(1.2.0)

https://cdnjs.cloudflare.com/ajax/libs/zepto/1.2.0/zepto.min.js

Zepto.js is a minimalist JavaScript library for modern browsers, with a jQuery-compatible API

angular-ui-bootstrap

version:(2.5.0)

https://cdnjs.cloudflare.com/ajax/libs/angular-ui-bootstrap/2.5.0/ui-bootstrap-tpls.min.js

Native AngularJS (Angular) directives for Bootstrap. Small footprint (5kB gzipped!), no 3rd party JS dependencies (jQuery, bootstrap JS) required!

masonry

version:(4.2.2)

https://cdnjs.cloudflare.com/ajax/libs/masonry/4.2.2/masonry.pkgd.min.js

Cascading grid layout library

parallax

version:(3.1.0)

https://cdnjs.cloudflare.com/ajax/libs/parallax/3.1.0/parallax.min.js

https://cdnjs.cloudflare.com/ajax/libs/jquery-handsontable/0.10.2/jquery.handsontable.full.min.js

Spreadsheet-like data grid editor that provides copy/paste functionality compatible with Excel/Google Docs

version:(0.12.6)

https://cdnjs.cloudflare.com/ajax/libs/selectize.js/0.12.6/js/selectize.min.js

Selectize is a jQuery-based custom <select> UI control. Useful for tagging, contact lists, country selectors, etc.

version:(1.4.2)

https://cdnjs.cloudflare.com/ajax/libs/respond.js/1.4.2/respond.min.js

min/max-width media query polyfill

version:(2.14.0)

https://cdnjs.cloudflare.com/ajax/libs/bootstrap-vue/2.14.0/bootstrap-vue.min.js

Quickly integrate Bootstrap 4 components with Vue.js

version:(4.2.0)

https://cdnjs.cloudflare.com/ajax/libs/fullcalendar/4.2.0/core/main.min.js

Full-sized drag & drop event calendar

magnific-popup.js

version:(1.1.0)

https://cdnjs.cloudflare.com/ajax/libs/magnific-popup.js/1.1.0/jquery.magnific-popup.min.js

Lightbox and modal dialog plugin. Can display inline HTML, iframes (YouTube video, Vimeo, Google Maps), or an image gallery. Animation effects are added with CSS3 transitions. For jQuery or Zepto.

tui-editor

version:(1.4.10)

https://cdnjs.cloudflare.com/ajax/libs/tui-editor/1.4.10/tui-editor-Editor.min.js

GFM Markdown Wysiwyg Editor - Productive and Extensible

jqueryui

version:(1.12.1)

https://cdnjs.cloudflare.com/ajax/libs/jqueryui/1.12.1/jquery-ui.min.js

A curated set of user interface interactions, effects, widgets, and themes built on top of the jQuery JavaScript Library.

gsap

version:(3.2.6)

https://cdnjs.cloudflare.com/ajax/libs/gsap/3.2.6/gsap.min.js

GSAP is a JavaScript library for building high-performance animations that work in **every** major browser. Animate CSS, SVG, canvas, React, Vue, WebGL, colors, strings, motion paths, generic objects...anything JavaScript can touch! No other library delivers such advanced sequencing, reliability, and tight control while solving real-world problems on millions of sites. GSAP works around countless browser inconsistencies; your animations **just work**. At its core, GSAP is a high-speed property manipulator, updating values over time with extreme accuracy. It's up to 20x faster than jQuery! See https://greensock.com/why-gsap/ for what makes GSAP so special.

history.js

version:(1.8)

https://cdnjs.cloudflare.com/ajax/libs/history.js/1.8/native.history.min.js

History.js gracefully supports the HTML5 History/State APIs (pushState, replaceState, onPopState) in all browsers. Including continued support for data, titles, replaceState. Supports jQuery, MooTools and Prototype. For HTML5 browsers this means that you can modify the URL directly, without needing to use hashes anymore. For HTML4 browsers it will revert back to using the old onhashchange functionality.

toastr.js

version:(2.1.4)

https://cdnjs.cloudflare.com/ajax/libs/toastr.js/2.1.4/toastr.min.js

ToastrJS is a JavaScript library for Gnome / Growl type non-blocking notifications. jQuery is required. The goal is to create a simple core library that can be customized and extended.

version:(3.0.6)

https://cdnjs.cloudflare.com/ajax/libs/jquery.isotope/3.0.6/isotope.pkgd.min.js

Filter and sort magical layouts

Touch-Optimized Web Framework for Smartphones & Tablets

Create an Apple-like one page scroller website (iPhone 5S website) with One Page Scroll plugin

A simple, lightweight jQuery plugin for reading, writing and deleting cookies.

Fast and powerful CSV parser for the browser that supports web workers and streaming large files. Converts CSV to JSON and JSON to CSV.

Minimalistic but perfect custom scrollbar plugin

https://cdnjs.cloudflare.com/ajax/libs/cropper/4.1.0/cropper.min.js

A simple jQuery image cropping plugin.

pickadate.js

version:(3.6.4)

https://cdnjs.cloudflare.com/ajax/libs/pickadate.js/3.6.4/picker.js

The mobile-friendly, responsive, and lightweight jQuery date & time input picker.

iCheck

version:(1.0.2)

https://cdnjs.cloudflare.com/ajax/libs/iCheck/1.0.2/icheck.min.js

Highly customizable checkboxes and radio buttons (jQuery and Zepto). Features: identical inputs across different browsers and devices (both desktop and mobile), touch devices support (iOS, Android, BlackBerry, Windows Phone, Amazon Kindle), keyboard accessible inputs (Tab, Spacebar, Arrow up/down and other shortcuts), screenreader accessible inputs — (ARIA attributes for VoiceOver and others), customization freedom (use any HTML and CSS to style inputs or try 6 Retina-ready skins), lightweight size (1 kb gzipped). Provides 32 options to customize checkboxes and radio buttons, 11 callbacks to handle changes, 9 methods to make changes programmatically. Saves changes to original inputs, works carefully with any selectors.

jquery.transit

version:(0.9.12)

https://cdnjs.cloudflare.com/ajax/libs/jquery.transit/0.9.12/jquery.transit.min.js

Smooth CSS3 transitions and transformations for jQuery.

OwlCarousel2

version:(2.3.4)

https://cdnjs.cloudflare.com/ajax/libs/OwlCarousel2/2.3.4/owl.carousel.min.js

Touch enabled jQuery plugin that lets you create beautiful responsive carousel slider.

version:(3.5.7)

https://cdnjs.cloudflare.com/ajax/libs/fancybox/3.5.7/jquery.fancybox.min.js

Touch enabled, responsive and fully customizable jQuery lightbox script

version:(1.2.0)

https://cdnjs.cloudflare.com/ajax/libs/FitText.js/1.2.0/jquery.fittext.min.js

A jQuery plugin for inflating web type

jquery-noty

version:(2.4.1)

https://cdnjs.cloudflare.com/ajax/libs/jquery-noty/2.4.1/jquery.noty.min.js

noty is a jQuery plugin that makes it easy to create alert - success - error - warning - information - confirmation messages as an alternative the standard alert dialog. Each notification is added to a queue. (Optional)

wysihtml5

version:(0.3.0)

https://cdnjs.cloudflare.com/ajax/libs/wysihtml5/0.3.0/wysihtml5.min.js

wysihtml5 is an open source rich text editor based on HTML5 technology and the progressive-enhancement approach. It uses a sophisticated security concept and aims to generate fully valid HTML5 markup by preventing unmaintainable tag soups and inline styles. The code is completely library agnostic: No jQuery, Prototype or similar is required.

version:(3.0.6)

https://cdnjs.cloudflare.com/ajax/libs/jquery-infinitescroll/3.0.6/infinite-scroll.pkgd.min.js

Infinite Scroll is a JavaScript plugin that automatically adds the next page, saving users from a full page load.

https://cdnjs.cloudflare.com/ajax/libs/jquery.adaptive-backgrounds/1.0.3/jquery.adaptive-backgrounds.min.js

A simple jQuery plugin to extract the dominant color of an image and apply it to the background of its parent element.

DataTables enhances HTML tables with the ability to sort, filter and page the data in the table very easily. It provides a comprehensive API and set of configuration options, allowing you to consume data from virtually any data source.

Compatible with iOS devices as iPad, Android, Blackberry, Windows Phone, and many many mobile and touch devices.

https://cdnjs.cloudflare.com/ajax/libs/distpicker/2.0.6/distpicker.min.js

A simple jQuery plugin for picking provinces, cities and districts of China.

A pack of several JQuery and Angular plugins, Rapidoid extras and other JavaScript libraries that work well together, included by default in the Rapidoid web application framework.

version:(0.12.1)

An intuitive, extensible way to work directly with the DOM.

https://cdnjs.cloudflare.com/ajax/libs/joyride/2.1.0/jquery.joyride.min.js

Joyride is an easy to configure jQuery site tour wizard.

multiscroll.js

https://cdnjs.cloudflare.com/ajax/libs/multiscroll.js/0.2.2/jquery.multiscroll.min.js

A simple plugin to create split scrolling websites with two vertical scrolling panels.

jQuery-rwdImageMaps

version:(1.6)

https://cdnjs.cloudflare.com/ajax/libs/jQuery-rwdImageMaps/1.6/jquery.rwdImageMaps.min.js

Allows image maps to be used in a responsive design by recalculating the area coordinates to match the actual image size on load and window.resize

Readmore.js

version:(2.2.1)

https://cdnjs.cloudflare.com/ajax/libs/Readmore.js/2.2.1/readmore.min.js

A lightweight jQuery plugin for collapsing and expanding long blocks of text with "Read more" and "Close" links.

twitter-bootstrap-wizard

version:(1.2)

https://cdnjs.cloudflare.com/ajax/libs/twitter-bootstrap-wizard/1.2/jquery.bootstrap.wizard.min.js

This twitter bootstrap plugin builds a wizard out of a formatter tabbable structure. It allows to build a wizard functionality using buttons to go through the different wizard steps and using events allows to hook into each step individually.

jquery.lazyloadxt

version:(1.1.0)

https://cdnjs.cloudflare.com/ajax/libs/jquery.lazyloadxt/1.1.0/jquery.lazyloadxt.min.js

Lazy Load XT is mobile-oriented, fast and extensible jQuery plugin for lazy loading of images, videos and other media with built-in support of jQueryMobile framework. It improves performance of website by loading visible media elements only, and elements below the fold are loaded after page scroll. The plugin has many options, supports callbacks and special lazy events, that allows to have different loading effects (e.g. fade in and spinner effects). Examples of plugin and its addons include ajax, background images, infinite scroll, horizontal scroll, iframe-based widgets (YouTube, Vimeo, Google Maps Engine Lite, Facebook recommend button, Google+ profile), html5 video, responsive images with retina support (srcset and picture polyfills), social widgets (embedded tweet, Twitter share button, Google Plus badge and share button, Facebook like and recommend buttons, Facebook post comments), load all images before print, etc. Tested in IE 6-11, Chrome 1-31, Firefox 1.5-27.0, Safari 3-7, Opera 10.6-18.0, iOS 5-7, Android 2.3-4.4, and WP8. Requires jQuery 1.7+, Zepto 1.0+, or DOMtastic 0.7.2+.

jsgrid

version:(1.5.3)

https://cdnjs.cloudflare.com/ajax/libs/jsgrid/1.5.3/jsgrid.min.js

Lightweight data grid jQuery plugin. It supports basic grid operations like inserting, filtering, editing, deleting, paging and sorting. Although jsGrid is tunable and allows to customize appearance and components.

justifiedGallery

version:(3.7.0)

https://cdnjs.cloudflare.com/ajax/libs/justifiedGallery/3.7.0/js/jquery.justifiedGallery.min.js

This is a JQuery plugin that allows you to create an high quality justified gallery of images. Fill all the spaces!

geocomplete

version:(1.7.0)

https://cdnjs.cloudflare.com/ajax/libs/geocomplete/1.7.0/jquery.geocomplete.min.js

An advanced jQuery plugin that wraps the Google Maps API's [Geocoding](https://code.google.com/apis/maps/documentation/javascript/geocoding.html) and [Places Autocomplete](https://code.google.com/apis/maps/documentation/javascript/places.html#places_autocomplete) services. You simply provide an input that lets you search for locations with a nice autocomplete dropdown. Optionally add a container to show an interactive map and a form that will be populated with the address details.

bootstrap-formhelpers

version:(2.3.0)

https://cdnjs.cloudflare.com/ajax/libs/bootstrap-formhelpers/2.3.0/js/bootstrap-formhelpers.min.js

A collection of jQuery plugins for Bootstrap.

anythingslider

version:(1.9.7)

https://cdnjs.cloudflare.com/ajax/libs/anythingslider/1.9.7/js/jquery.anythingslider.min.js

Just what the world needs, another jQuery slider. YAWN. I know, check this one out though, it's got lots of cool features.Here on CSS-Tricks, I've created a number of different sliders. Three, in fact. A "featured content" slider, a "start/stop slider", and "moving boxes". Each of them had some cool interesting feature that I needed to build at the time. All were well-received, but as is the case with these things, people want them to do X, Y, and Z in addition to what they already did.This new AnythingSlider is an attempt at bringing together the functionality of all of those previous sliders and adding new features. In other words, to create a really "full featured" slider that could be widely useful. This is the first time (on CSS-Tricks) that one of these sliders is an actual plugin as well, which should make implementing it and customizing it much easier.

alpaca

version:(1.5.27)

https://cdnjs.cloudflare.com/ajax/libs/alpaca/1.5.27/bootstrap/alpaca.min.css

Alpaca provides the easiest and fastest way to generate interactive forms for the web and mobile devices. It runs simply as HTML5 or more elaborately using Bootstrap, jQuery Mobile or jQuery UI. Alpaca uses Handlebars to process JSON schema and provide

jquery-form-validator

version:(2.3.79)

https://cdnjs.cloudflare.com/ajax/libs/jquery-form-validator/2.3.79/jquery.form-validator.min.js

With this feature rich jQuery plugin it becomes easy to validate user input while keeping your HTML markup clean from javascript code. Even though this plugin has a wide range of validation functions it's designed to require as little bandwidth as possible. This is achieved by grouping together validation functions in "modules", making it possible for the programmer to load only those functions that's needed to validate a particular form.

The best jQuery plugin to validate form fields. Designed to use with Bootstrap 3

bigtext

version:(1.0.1)

https://cdnjs.cloudflare.com/ajax/libs/bigtext/1.0.1/bigtext.js

Calculates the font-size and word-spacing needed to match a line of text to a specific width. (jQuery plugin)

jquery-maskmoney

version:(3.0.2)

https://cdnjs.cloudflare.com/ajax/libs/jquery-maskmoney/3.0.2/jquery.maskMoney.min.js

jQuery plugin to mask data entry in the input text in the form of money (currency)

bootstrap-tokenfield

version:(0.12.0)

https://cdnjs.cloudflare.com/ajax/libs/bootstrap-tokenfield/0.12.0/bootstrap-tokenfield.min.js

Advanced tagging/tokenizing plugin for input fields with a focus on keyboard and copy-paste support.

jquery.selectboxit

version:(3.8.0)

https://cdnjs.cloudflare.com/ajax/libs/jquery.selectboxit/3.8.0/jquery.selectBoxIt.min.js

A jQuery plugin that progressively enhances an HTML Select Box into a single option dropdown list. The dropdown list can be optionally styled with jQuery ThemeRoller and optionally animated with jQueryUI show/hide effects.

marginotes

version:(0.1.0)

https://cdnjs.cloudflare.com/ajax/libs/marginotes/0.1.0/marginotes.min.js

Quick, cool margin notes with jQuery

egjs

https://cdnjs.cloudflare.com/ajax/libs/egjs/1.5.0/eg.min.js

Set of UI interactions, effects and utilities components library.

version:(1.8.0)

version:(1.4.1)

https://cdnjs.cloudflare.com/ajax/libs/jquery-easing/1.4.1/jquery.easing.min.js

A jQuery plugin from GSGD to give advanced easing options

tweet

version:(2.2.0)

https://cdnjs.cloudflare.com/ajax/libs/tweet/2.2.0/jquery.tweet.min.js

put twitter on your website with tweet, an unobtrusive javascript plugin for jquery

version:(1.5.0)

https://cdnjs.cloudflare.com/ajax/libs/slider-pro/1.5.0/css/slider-pro.min.css

Responsive jQuery slider, featuring modular architecture, CSS3 animations, touch swipe, animated layers, retina, lazy loading and much more.

Dropify

version:(0.2.2)

https://cdnjs.cloudflare.com/ajax/libs/Dropify/0.2.2/js/dropify.min.js

Override your input files with style.

jquery.address

version:(1.6)

https://cdnjs.cloudflare.com/ajax/libs/jquery.address/1.6/jquery.address.min.js

The jQuery Address plugin provides powerful deep linking capabilities and allows the creation of unique virtual addresses that can point to a website section or an application state. It enables a number of important capabilities including bookmarking in a browser or social website sending links via email or instant messenger, finding specific content using the major search engines and utilizing browser history and reload buttons.

jsviews

version:(1.0.6)

https://cdnjs.cloudflare.com/ajax/libs/jsviews/1.0.6/jsviews.min.js

Next-generation MVVM and MVP framework - built on top of JsRender templates. Bringing templates to life...

burger

version:(2.0.2)

https://cdnjs.cloudflare.com/ajax/libs/burger/2.0.2/scripts/burger.min.js

Burger is a minimal hamburger menu with fullscreen navigation.

version:(1.0.0)

https://cdnjs.cloudflare.com/ajax/libs/bootstrap-growl/1.0.0/jquery.bootstrap-growl.min.js

Pretty simple jQuery plugin that turns standard Bootstrap alerts into hovering 'Growl-like' notifications.

jquery.hoverintent

version:(1.10.1)

https://cdnjs.cloudflare.com/ajax/libs/jquery.hoverintent/1.10.1/jquery.hoverIntent.min.js

hoverIntent is a plug-in that attempts to determine the user's intent... like a crystal ball, only with mouse movement! It is similar to jQuery's hover method. However, instead of calling the handlerIn function immediately, hoverIntent waits until the user's mouse slows down enough before making the call.

response.js

version:(0.10.1)

https://cdnjs.cloudflare.com/ajax/libs/response.js/0.10.1/response.min.js

Response is an experimental jQuery/Ender/Zepto plugin that gives web designers tools for building responsive websites. It can dynamically swap content based on breakpoints and data attributes.

https://cdnjs.cloudflare.com/ajax/libs/multi-level-push-menu/2.1.4/jquery.multilevelpushmenu.min.js

version:(1.9.1)

https://cdnjs.cloudflare.com/ajax/libs/bootstrap-maxlength/1.9.1/bootstrap-maxlength.min.js

trunk8

version:(1.3.3)

https://cdnjs.cloudflare.com/ajax/libs/trunk8/1.3.3/trunk8.min.js

trunk8 is an intelligent text truncation plugin to jQuery. When applied to a large block of text, trunk8 will cut off just enough text to prevent it from spilling over. Unlike conventional truncation that just limits the character length of text, trunk8 measures the content area for spill-over and intelligently chooses the text that best fits in the given space.

jquery-jgrowl

version:(1.4.7)

https://cdnjs.cloudflare.com/ajax/libs/jquery-jgrowl/1.4.7/jquery.jgrowl.min.js

jGrowl is a jQuery plugin that raises unobtrusive messages within the browser, similar to the way that OS X's Growl Framework works. The idea is simple, deliver notifications to the end user in a noticeable way that doesn't obstruct the work flow and yet keeps the user informed.

prettyPhoto is a jQuery based lightbox clone. Not only does it support images, it also add support for videos, flash, YouTube, iFrames. It’s a full blown media lightbox. The setup is easy and quick, plus the script is compatible in every major browser.

jQuery Finger unifies click and touch events by removing the 300ms delay on touch devices. It also provide a common set of events to handle basic gestures such as drag and pinch. Small (< 1kb gzipped), it is focused on performance, is well tested and ... also supports jQuery delegated events.

version:(0.11.0)

https://cdnjs.cloudflare.com/ajax/libs/bPopup/0.11.0/jquery.bpopup.min.js

jquery-autotab

version:(1.9.2)

https://cdnjs.cloudflare.com/ajax/libs/jquery-autotab/1.9.2/js/jquery.autotab.min.js

jquery-locationpicker

version:(0.1.12)

https://cdnjs.cloudflare.com/ajax/libs/jquery-locationpicker/0.1.12/locationpicker.jquery.min.js

This plug-in allows to easily find and select a location on the Google map. Along with a single point selection, it allows to choose an area by providing its center and the radius. All the data can be saved to any HTML input element automatically as well as be processed by Javascript (callback support). The other feature of the plug-in is automatic address resolver which allows to get address line from the selected latitude and longitude. The plug-in also supports searching by address typed into the bound input element which uses auto-complete feature from Google API to make the search process easier. In this case the marker will be automatically positioned on the map after successful address resolution.

TableDnD

version:(1.0.3)

https://cdnjs.cloudflare.com/ajax/libs/TableDnD/1.0.3/jquery.tablednd.min.js

jQuery plug-in to drag and drop rows in HTML tables

jquery.html5loader

version:(1.8.0)

https://cdnjs.cloudflare.com/ajax/libs/jquery.html5loader/1.8.0/jquery.html5Loader.min.js

jQuery.html5Loader can preload <b>images</b>, html5 <b>video</b> and <b>audio</b> sources, <b>css</b>, <b>scripts</b> and <b>text</b> files. This plugin needs a <b>JSON</b> file to get the files that must be preloaded (you can use also use a javascript object as well), and it provides an easy API to give you the the amount of file loaded in percentage.

jQuery.Gantt

version:(1.1.0)

https://cdnjs.cloudflare.com/ajax/libs/jQuery.Gantt/1.1.0/js/jquery.fn.gantt.min.js

jQuery Gantt Chart is a simple chart that implements gantt functionality as a jQuery component.

embedly-jquery

version:(3.1.2)

https://cdnjs.cloudflare.com/ajax/libs/embedly-jquery/3.1.2/jquery.embedly.min.js

This library allows you to easily embed objects on any page.

angular-bootstrap-switch

version:(0.5.2)

https://cdnjs.cloudflare.com/ajax/libs/angular-bootstrap-switch/0.5.2/angular-bootstrap-switch.min.js

AngularJS directive for the bootstrap-switch jQuery plugin.

github-repo-widget

version:(e23d85ab8f)

https://cdnjs.cloudflare.com/ajax/libs/github-repo-widget/e23d85ab8f/jquery.githubRepoWidget.min.js

GitHub jQuery Repo Widget will build you a beautiful widget that displays the status of your GitHub repo.

timecircles

version:(1.5.3)

https://cdnjs.cloudflare.com/ajax/libs/timecircles/1.5.3/TimeCircles.min.js

TimeCircles is a jQuery plugin that provides a nice looking way to either count down towards a certain time, or to count up from a certain time. The goal for TimeCircles is to provide a simple yet dynamic tool that makes it very easy to provide visitors an attractive countdown or timer.

jReject

version:(1.1.4)

https://cdnjs.cloudflare.com/ajax/libs/jReject/1.1.4/js/jquery.reject.min.js

jReject is a simple tool for rejecting specific browsers in a nice modal window

poshytip

version:(1.2)

https://cdnjs.cloudflare.com/ajax/libs/poshytip/1.2/jquery.poshytip.min.js

jQuery Plugin for Stylish Tooltips

cloudinary-jquery

version:(2.8.2)

https://cdnjs.cloudflare.com/ajax/libs/cloudinary-jquery/2.8.2/cloudinary-jquery.min.js

Cloudinary Client Side JS library. Cloudinary streamlines your web application’s image manipulation needs. Cloudinary's cloud-based servers automate image uploading, resizing, cropping, optimizing, sprite generation and more.

jbone

version:(1.2.1)

https://cdnjs.cloudflare.com/ajax/libs/jbone/1.2.1/jbone.min.js

Library for DOM manipulation

jquery.is.js

version:(0.2.1)

https://cdnjs.cloudflare.com/ajax/libs/jquery.is.js/0.2.1/jquery.is.min.js

Check your data against regular expressions or known keywords.

stickyNavbar.js

version:(1.3.5)

https://cdnjs.cloudflare.com/ajax/libs/stickyNavbar.js/1.3.5/jquery.stickyNavbar.min.js

Fancy sticky navigation jQuery plugin with smart anchor links highlighting

timer.jquery

version:(0.9.0)

https://cdnjs.cloudflare.com/ajax/libs/timer.jquery/0.9.0/timer.jquery.min.js

Start/Stop/Resume/Remove a timer inside any HTML element.

clickspark.js

version:(1.16.0)

https://cdnjs.cloudflare.com/ajax/libs/clickspark.js/1.16.0/clickspark.min.js

ClickSpark.js is a javascript utility that adds beautiful particle effects to your javascript events. Add image-files as single particles and configure where and when a particle fountain should be fired.

jquery-dotimeout

version:(1.0)

https://cdnjs.cloudflare.com/ajax/libs/jquery-dotimeout/1.0/jquery.ba-dotimeout.min.js

jQuery doTimeout takes the work out of delayed code execution, including interval and timeout management, polling loops and debouncing.

jquerykeyframes

version:(0.0.9)

https://cdnjs.cloudflare.com/ajax/libs/jquerykeyframes/0.0.9/jquery.keyframes.min.js

jQuery-Keyframes allows dynamic generation of CSS3 keyframes with callback events and other niceness.

tinyColorPicker

version:(1.1.1)

https://cdnjs.cloudflare.com/ajax/libs/tinyColorPicker/1.1.1/jqColorPicker.min.js

Tiny jQuery color picker for mobile and desktop with alpha channel

jquery.inview

version:(1.0.0)

https://cdnjs.cloudflare.com/ajax/libs/jquery.inview/1.0.0/jquery.inview.min.js

Remy Sharp's jQuery plugin adds a bindable 'inview' event for detecting when an element is scrolled into view.

jquery.repeater

version:(1.2.1)

https://cdnjs.cloudflare.com/ajax/libs/jquery.repeater/1.2.1/jquery.repeater.min.js

repeatable form input interface

multiselect

version:(2.2.9)

https://cdnjs.cloudflare.com/ajax/libs/multiselect/2.2.9/js/multiselect.min.js

jQuery multiselect plugin with two sides

version:(2.0.0)

https://cdnjs.cloudflare.com/ajax/libs/highchartTable/2.0.0/jquery.highchartTable.min.js

This jQuery plugin provides a simple way to convert HTML data tables to Highcharts graphs.

angular-ui-slider

version:(0.4.0)

https://cdnjs.cloudflare.com/ajax/libs/angular-ui-slider/0.4.0/slider.min.js

This directive allows you to add a slider to your form elements.

us-map

version:(1.0.1)

https://cdnjs.cloudflare.com/ajax/libs/us-map/1.0.1/jquery.usmap.min.js

A Javascript map of the United States built with SVG/VML by using Raphael as a jQuery plugin.

email-autocomplete

version:(0.1.3)

https://cdnjs.cloudflare.com/ajax/libs/email-autocomplete/0.1.3/jquery.email-autocomplete.min.js

jQuery plugin that displays in-place autocomplete suggestions for email input fields.

jquery-spellchecker

version:(0.2.3)

https://cdnjs.cloudflare.com/ajax/libs/jquery-spellchecker/0.2.3/js/jquery.spellchecker.min.js

A lightweight jQuery plugin that can check the spelling of text within a form field or DOM tree.

primeui

version:(4.1.15)

https://cdnjs.cloudflare.com/ajax/libs/primeui/4.1.15/primeui.min.js

PrimeUI PrimeUI is a collection of rich javascript widgets and web components based on jQuery UI API

PrintArea

version:(2.4.1)

https://cdnjs.cloudflare.com/ajax/libs/PrintArea/2.4.1/jquery.PrintArea.min.js

Prints a specific area of the page. Using json settings, the printed area is either opened in a popup or in a hidden iframe. Minimal setup and easy to use. See the demo for examples and usage of the options.

ajaxify

version:(7.6.2)

https://cdnjs.cloudflare.com/ajax/libs/ajaxify/7.6.2/ajaxify.min.js

Ajaxify your site out of the box, instantly

jquery-layout

version:(1.4.3)

https://cdnjs.cloudflare.com/ajax/libs/jquery-layout/1.4.3/jquery.layout.min.js

jQuery plugin for layout management (jQuery version of extJS border-layout).

version:(0.25.0)

https://cdnjs.cloudflare.com/ajax/libs/require-jquery/0.25.0/require-jquery.min.js

Require.js merged with jQuery for loader goodness!

version:(1.0.13)

https://cdnjs.cloudflare.com/ajax/libs/jquery-nstslider/1.0.13/jquery.nstSlider.min.js

Fully customizable with CSS, Single/Double handles, Touch-enabled, IE 7+ Compatibility, Custom Digit Rounding, Non linear step increments!

version:(2.5.1)

https://cdnjs.cloudflare.com/ajax/libs/jquery.poptrox/2.5.1/jquery.poptrox.min.js

A lightbox gallery plugin for jQuery.

version:(1.6.0)

Drag & drop hierarchical list with mouse and touch compatibility

version:(2.0.2)

https://cdnjs.cloudflare.com/ajax/libs/jQueryFormStyler/2.0.2/jquery.formstyler.min.js

Jquery plugin for styling HTML form elements

version:(1.1.14)

https://cdnjs.cloudflare.com/ajax/libs/jquery.meiomask/1.1.14/meiomask.min.js

A jquery plugin for masking text inputs.

version:(0.1)

https://cdnjs.cloudflare.com/ajax/libs/jquery-appear/0.1/jquery.appear.min.js

jQuery plugin to call a function when an element appears

jquery-json

version:(2.6.0)

https://cdnjs.cloudflare.com/ajax/libs/jquery-json/2.6.0/jquery.json.min.js

jQuery plugin for serialising to and parsing from JSON.

jquery-outside-events

version:(1.1)

https://cdnjs.cloudflare.com/ajax/libs/jquery-outside-events/1.1/jquery.ba-outside-events.min.js

With jQuery outside events you can bind to an event that will be triggered only when a specific 'originating' event occurs outside the element in question.

jquery-price-format

version:(2.2.0)

https://cdnjs.cloudflare.com/ajax/libs/jquery-price-format/2.2.0/jquery.priceformat.min.js

jQuery Price Format plugin is useful to format input text fields or any HTML element as prices.

inputmask-multi

version:(1.2.0)

https://cdnjs.cloudflare.com/ajax/libs/inputmask-multi/1.2.0/js/jquery.inputmask-multi.min.js

Inputmask Multi is a plugin which allows to select a mask of input basing on the beginning of entered data (such as an international phone number)

jQuery-Paging

version:(1.2.0)

https://cdnjs.cloudflare.com/ajax/libs/jQuery-Paging/1.2.0/jquery.paging.min.js

Probably the most advanced jQuery pagination plugin.

jquery.actual

version:(1.0.19)

https://cdnjs.cloudflare.com/ajax/libs/jquery.actual/1.0.19/jquery.actual.min.js

Older version of jQuery has trouble finding the width/height of invisible DOM elements. With element or its parent element has css property 'display' set to 'none'. `$('.hidden').width();` will return 0 instead of the actual width; This plugin simply fix it.

iviewer

version:(0.7.11)

https://cdnjs.cloudflare.com/ajax/libs/iviewer/0.7.11/jquery.iviewer.min.js

jQuery.iviewer is an jQuery UI widget responsible for image view control with zoom control and a possibility to move image in area by the mouse.

version:(1.0.0)

https://cdnjs.cloudflare.com/ajax/libs/jquery-orgchart/1.0.0/jquery.orgchart.min.js

A small jQuery plugin that generates a hierarchical organisational chart from a regular HTML nested unordered list.

jquery-history

version:(1.9)

https://cdnjs.cloudflare.com/ajax/libs/jquery-history/1.9/jquery.history.min.js

jQuery history plugin helps you to support back/forward buttons and bookmarks in your javascript applications.

https://cdnjs.cloudflare.com/ajax/libs/jquery-te/1.4.0/jquery-te.min.js

version:(0.2)

https://cdnjs.cloudflare.com/ajax/libs/placeholder-shiv/0.2/placeholder-shiv.min.js

Tiny polyfill for the placeholder form element attribute. Requires Prototype.js or jQuery.

version:(1.5.1)

https://cdnjs.cloudflare.com/ajax/libs/guards/1.5.1/guards.min.js

Guard your forms with class (or any other selector).

version:(1.1.1)

https://cdnjs.cloudflare.com/ajax/libs/jquery-prompt21/1.1.1/jquery-prompt21.min.js

A minimalist jQuery prompt plugin for the 21st Century.

dollar.js

version:(1.5.1)

https://cdnjs.cloudflare.com/ajax/libs/dollar.js/1.5.1/dollar.min.js

A jQuery-compatible and non-All-in-One library which is more "Zepto" than Zepto.js

egjs-jquery-transform

version:(2.0.0)

https://cdnjs.cloudflare.com/ajax/libs/egjs-jquery-transform/2.0.0/transform.min.js

A method extended from the jQuery animate() method. It supports CSS transform property and 3D acceleration.

jquery-contextify

version:(1.0.8)

https://cdnjs.cloudflare.com/ajax/libs/jquery-contextify/1.0.8/jquery.contextify.min.js

A lightweight jQuery plugin for creating Bootstrap powered context menus.

ornajs

version:(3.3.7)

https://cdnjs.cloudflare.com/ajax/libs/ornajs/3.3.7/orna.min.js

OrnaJS is a tool for creation Atomic CSS. Orna lightweight, clear and easy. It works with jQuery.

angular-translate-loader-url

version:(2.18.2)

https://cdnjs.cloudflare.com/ajax/libs/angular-translate-loader-url/2.18.2/angular-translate-loader-url.min.js

Creates a loading function for a typical dynamic url pattern: "locale.php?lang=en_US", "locale.php?lang=de_DE", "locale.php?language=nl_NL" etc. Prefixing the specified url, the current requested, language id will be applied with "?{queryParameter}={key}". Using this service, the response of these urls must be an object of key-value pairs.

jquery-domPath

version:(1.0.0)

https://cdnjs.cloudflare.com/ajax/libs/jquery-domPath/1.0.0/jquery.domPath.min.js

A simple jQuery plugin for getting DOM Path of HTML elements

Sidy.js

version:(1.1.0)

https://cdnjs.cloudflare.com/ajax/libs/Sidy.js/1.1.0/sidy.js

jQuery plugin for Off-, On- canvas panels with CSS3 animations

sql.js

version:(1.2.2)

https://cdnjs.cloudflare.com/ajax/libs/sql.js/1.2.2/js/sql.js

SQLite library with support for opening and writing databases, prepared statements, and more. This SQLite library is in pure javascript (compiled with emscripten).

egjs-jquery-pauseresume

version:(2.0.1)

https://cdnjs.cloudflare.com/ajax/libs/egjs-jquery-pauseresume/2.0.1/pauseresume.min.js

Pauses and resumes animation executed by the jQuery animate() method

mhayes-twentytwenty

version:(1.0.0)

https://cdnjs.cloudflare.com/ajax/libs/mhayes-twentytwenty/1.0.0/js/jquery.twentytwenty.min.js

Visual diff plugin to compare images

cloudinary-jquery-file-upload

version:(2.8.2)

https://cdnjs.cloudflare.com/ajax/libs/cloudinary-jquery-file-upload/2.8.2/cloudinary-jquery-file-upload.min.js

Cloudinary Client Side JS library. Cloudinary streamlines your web application’s image manipulation needs. Cloudinary's cloud-based servers automate image uploading, resizing, cropping, optimizing, sprite generation and more. Cloudinary's jQuery File Upload plugin allows direct uploading from the browser to the cloud and dynamic cloud-based image transformations and effects.

filter.js

A javascript library for filtering json object and rendering html

flipCounter

version:(1.2)

https://cdnjs.cloudflare.com/ajax/libs/flipCounter/1.2/jquery.flipCounter.pack.min.js

Uses valid markup and an image sprite to render an analogue clock / odometer effect. Clock image is easily customizable, default options can be easily overriden, can be easily animated and extended with jQuery.easing plugin, gracefully degrades if Javascript is not available.
